metadata.description: Simplicio ecosystem — the Universal Looping AI Orchestrator and its satellite skills (loop, orient, review, compress, learn).

plugins.name: simplicio-loop
plugins.description: Not a chatbot — a worker. An autonomous orchestrator of 6 composable skills that drives a whole backlog end-to-end on any LLM or runtime: discover, implement, verify, review, merge, close. A hardened Ralph loop exits only when a typed completion-promise is genuinely true — never on a false done. Project-scoped fail-closed Bash safety-gate, adversarial pre-merge review, and a hard cost kill-switch. Runs 100% locally — zero network calls, zero telemetry. Start a run with /simplicio-tasks. MIT.
